name: Beer Nuts
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Cup water per lb of raw peanuts
1 Cup sugar per lb of raw peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a heavy skillet over medium-low heat.
2. Cook until all liquid has evaporated, stirring constantly.
3. Spread the mixture on a heavily salted cookie sheet.
4. Top the mixture with more salt.
5. Bake at 275°F for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
